headline: FCX's Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates on Higher Copper Prices
summary: FCX tops Q1 estimates as profits surge 150% and revenues beat forecasts, while higher copper, gold and molybdenum prices offset weaker volumes.

raw.headline: FCX's Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates on Higher Copper Prices
raw.summary: FCX tops Q1 estimates as profits surge 150% and revenues beat forecasts, while higher copper, gold and molybdenum prices offset weaker volumes.

headline: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Valmont Industries' Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y
summary: VMI tops Q1 estimates with 6% revenue growth, boosted by infrastructure strength, while updating its 2026 outlook with higher EPS guidance.

headline: Air Products Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of Air Products (NYSE:APD) today declared a quarterly dividend of $1.81 per share of common stock.

headline: Air Products Declares Quarterly Dividend, Payable on August 10, 2026
summary: Air Products declared a quarterly dividend of $1.81 per share of common stock. The dividend is payable on August 10, 2026 to shareholders of record at the close of business on July 1, 2026....

headline: Dow Inc. (DOW) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +64.10% and +3.10%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
